column1: # /Range Format Date — submenu into D1..D5 (and a Time sub-sub that
# is still stubbed). Each variant applies a date format to the POINT
# range; the control-panel tag matches the D-number.
# /RFD → Date submenu; D1..D5 accelerators, plus Time.
# Pick 1 → D1 (DD-MMM-YY) → POINT → commit on A1.
# Re-apply D3 to overwrite the format.
